# myAnalyst

> myAnalyst, a product of SiteTech Systems, is an all-in-one real-time analytics dashboard for multi-unit auto-service chains (quick-lube, tire, and repair) and other multi-location operators. It reads a chain's point-of-sale (POS) data and turns it into live store-by-store dashboards, a 0 to 100 Store Health score and A to F grade for every location, budget pacing and forecasting, VIN- and household-level retention intelligence, and SMS/MMS alerts the moment a KPI crosses a threshold. Data refreshes every 5 minutes. Support is 100% U.S.-based.

## Key facts
- Product: myAnalyst (real-time multi-location operations analytics)
- Company: SiteTech Systems, Myrtle Beach, SC, USA
- Address: 2513 N. Oak St, Suite 305, Myrtle Beach, SC
- Phone: 843-808-9716
- Data refresh: every 5 minutes
- Proof points: 1,100+ locations served, $2B+ annual revenue analyzed, ~10:1 average client ROI (client-reported)
- Pricing model: subscription, priced by number of locations (custom quote; no public list price)
- Integrations in: POS, payroll, QuickBooks; out: Salesforce, HubSpot, BI tools (via the Data Pipelines add-on)
- Industries served: auto care, car wash, hospitality, QSR/fast food, fitness, retail/c-store, home services
- Connection is read-only; no POS or accounting replacement; most clients are live in days

## Core pages
- [Platform](https://www.myanalystpro.com/platform.html): LiveStats, Store Health, Pacing & Forecast, Geospatial Map, Retention, auditing, and Report Builder.
- [myAnalyst Pro](https://www.myanalystpro.com/pro.html): an AI-assisted analyst that monitors every location 24/7 and delivers a plain-English monthly briefing.
- [Add-ons](https://www.myanalystpro.com/add-ons.html): Signals SMS alerts, Customer Mapping, Real Estate Consulting, and Data Pipelines.
- [Integrations](https://www.myanalystpro.com/integrations.html): the POS, payroll, accounting, marketing, operations, and survey systems myAnalyst reads from.
- [Pricing](https://www.myanalystpro.com/pricing.html): Core, Plus, and Expert plans, priced by number of locations, with enterprise plans for groups of 15+.

## Platform features
- [LiveStats](https://www.myanalystpro.com/livestats.html): real-time, store-by-store sales, cars, ticket average, and labor, refreshed every 5 minutes.
- [Pacing & Forecast](https://www.myanalystpro.com/pacing-forecast.html): month-to-date pace vs budget with shape-adjusted projections.
- [Retention](https://www.myanalystpro.com/retention.html): VIN- and household-level retention intelligence, CLV, RFM segments, and at-risk revenue.
- [Geospatial Map](https://www.myanalystpro.com/geospatial-map.html): street-level customer origin, trade areas, and drive-time analysis.
- [Roles](https://www.myanalystpro.com/roles.html): how owners, multi-unit operators, and district managers each use myAnalyst.

## Answer content (definitions, Q&A, methodology)
- [FAQ](https://www.myanalystpro.com/faq.html): plain answers to common questions about setup, integrations, pricing, and support.
- [Glossary](https://www.myanalystpro.com/glossary.html): definitions of auto-service and multi-unit analytics terms (ARO, car count, Store Health, RFM, capture rate, daypart, and more).
- [What is a Store Health score?](https://www.myanalystpro.com/store-health-score.html): the 0 to 100 scoring methodology and its five weighted pillars.
- [About SiteTech Systems](https://www.myanalystpro.com/about.html): who builds myAnalyst.

## Solutions
- [Best all-in-one dashboard for multi-unit operators](https://www.myanalystpro.com/best-all-in-one-multi-unit-dashboard.html): buyer's guide and why multi-location operators choose myAnalyst as their all-in-one dashboard.
- [Auto-service analytics](https://www.myanalystpro.com/auto-service-analytics.html): for quick-lube, tire, and repair chains.
- [Multi-location dashboard software](https://www.myanalystpro.com/multi-location-dashboard-software.html): consolidate every location into one real-time view.
- [myAnalyst vs. generic BI](https://www.myanalystpro.com/compare-myanalyst-vs-bi.html): purpose-built analytics compared with Power BI, Tableau, and spreadsheets.
